prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_1886 Product Type: LABEL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 12 Piece Aluminum Dog Tags Military GI Blank Key Chains Description: Identify pets or medications easily with the 12pk of Aluminum Dog Tags! These are also great to use for luggage identification and other travel needs.

This pack of dog tags comes with 12 blank key chains, all perfect for engraving. Each pack comes with 6 different colors and the chain is 3.25" in length.

Make sure to grab a few of these to easily identify just about anything!

Package Includes:
-(12) Assorted Aluminum Dog Tag Key Chains Search Terms: engraveable key chain military law enforcement pet identification medication identification Features: - Overall Size: 2" x 1.25" - Key Chain Length: 3.25" - Material: Aluminum - 6 Assorted Colors for Identifying Pets, Medications, etc. - Blank; Engrave-able === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-pk Aluminum Dog Tags Military Blank Key Chains

tokens.name: Aluminum Dog Tags Military Blank Key Chains

anthropic.title_differentiation: Engraveable, 6 Assorted Colors, Military Grade, Pet And Medication ID, 325 Inch Chain, Aluminum

openai.title_differentiation: Blank Engraveable Aluminum, 6 Assorted Colors, 325" Chains, Pet Medication And Travel ID, Lightweight
